channel.title: CastLog Field Notes
channel.description: Fast logging, AI patterns, and the apps that get in your way.

item.title: Log a Catch in Under 5 Seconds (No Phone Tantrum)
item.description: Fast catch logging with 3 taps and voice input. CastLog gets out of the way so you can get back to fishing. Here's exactly how it works.

item.title: The Fishbrain Alternative Anglers Want in 2026
item.description: Tired of Fishbrain's $80/yr paywall and broken offline mode? CastLog logs a catch in 3 taps, under 5 seconds. Here's why anglers are switching.

item.title: AI Fish Identification: What Actually Works in 2026
item.description: An honest look at AI fish identification accuracy in 2026, and why the logging pipeline matters more than the photo match.

item.title: Best Offline Fishing App When You Have Zero Signal
item.description: Most fishing apps silently fail without cell service. Here's why offline-first design matters and how CastLog logs catches in under 5 seconds, no signal needed.

item.title: Water Temperature Bass Fishing: The 5-Degree Rule
item.description: Learn how 5-degree water temp bands predict bass behavior and lure choice—and how CastLog's pattern engine turns your logs into a personal heat map.
